items.titolo: AI will accelerate tech job growth - former Tesla president explains where and why
items.descrizione: Venture capitalist Jon McNeill foresees growing demand for humans to sustain complex AI infrastructure and architecture.

items.titolo: Gemini, nell'app è in arrivo la scheda Discover
Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
items.descrizione: In response to Anthropic’s lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military.
